response.justification: Despite extensive experience, Bogdan is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; his resume shows senior/staff-level responsibilities across 10+ roles, with heavy emphasis on DLang and non-relevant domains (embedded, GIS, AI agents), lacking clear focus on renewable energy tech, React/Nest.js, or PostgreSQL as required. His German language skill is basic, conflicting with high on-site presence in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack experience across multiple frameworks
Demonstrated expertise in REST APIs, databases, and CI/CD infrastructure
Proven ability to lead projects and contribute to open-source tooling
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role with staff-level tenure across companies
Minimal evidence of React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL in recent work; focus on DLang and MongoDB
Basic German proficiency contradicts high on-site requirement in Berlin
